title: Archineottia microglottis
taxonomy: Archineottia microglottis belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a genus of flowering plants, and Archineottia microglottis is one of its species. More specifically, the classification of Archineottia microglottis includes being part of the subtribe Goniocorysinae and the tribe Gongoreae. However, its exact classification may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further study is needed to confirm its current classification within the orchid family.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information about Archineottia microglottis's medicinal uses.
